news.t: First Manhattan Launches Actively Managed Equity ETF—FM Compounders Equity ETF (Ticker: FMCE)

holdings.infoBox: FMCE is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Sachs Financial Square Government Fund Institutional Shares stock at 9.82%, GE Aerospace at 5.07%, Intel at 4.79%, Berkshire Hathaway at 4.61%, and The Progressive Corporation at 4.24%.

overview.description: The FM Compounders Equity ETF (FMCE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, selecting 25-35 US stocks considered to be highly resilient and possess strong competitive advantages. The fund aims for long-term capital appreciation through fundamental research and selective investments FMCE was launched on Nov 8, 2024 and is issued by FM.
